voice.signature: Pauses before important statements, uses precise language
Short sentences, states facts, ends on periods

example.title: Voice Bleed (What to Avoid)
example.text: Elena looked at the report. "I think we should consider the implications carefully," she said thoughtfully. Marcus nodded in agreement. "Yeah, it's pretty strange. We should probably investigate further," he added helpfully.
example.issue: Both characters sound the same — thoughtful, hedging, similar sentence structure.

example.title: Isolated Voices (Target)
example.text:
Elena lifted the report. Her eyes moved across the page. "Consider." She paused. "The Q3 projections show a seventeen percent deviation from expected values."
Marcus leaned against the doorframe. Arms crossed. "Deviation's wrong." He jerked his chin at the paper. "Someone cooked the books. You know it. I know it."
She didn't look up. "The data requires further analysis pre—"
"The data's garbage." He straightened. "Question is what you're gonna do about it."
example.benefit: Distinct voices: Elena's precision vs Marcus's directness. Each maintains signature patterns.

implementation-protocol.step: IDENTIFY speaker before each dialogue exchange
PREVENT voice bleed: check sentence structure, word choice, emotional display
